privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a LimeSurvey survey titled 'Q4 2024 Post-Purchase Customer Satisfaction' with 4 custom token attributes: Customer Segment, Store Region, Loyalty Tier, and Annual Spend Bracket. Eight synthetic participants must be added with specific email addresses and attribute values: Sarah Mitchell (Premium/Northeast/Gold/High), James Rodriguez (Standard/Southeast/Silver/Medium), Wei Chen (Premium/West/Gold/High), Aisha Patel (Budget/Midwest/Bronze/Low), Marcus Thompson (Standard/Northeast/Silver/Medium), Elena Kowalski (Premium/Southeast/Gold/High), David Okafor (Budget/West/Bronze/Low), and Lisa Nakamura (Standard/Midwest/Silver/Medium). All metadata claims match exactly with the task description requirements.
